heading: Liability for compensation
label: 904 Liability for compensation
notes: Amendments1984—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (a) read as follows: “Every employer shall be liable for and shall secure the payment to his employees of the compensation payable under sections 907, 908, and 909 of this title. In the case of an employer who is a subcontractor, the contractor shall be liable for and shall secure the payment of such compensation to employees of the subcontractor unless the subcontractor has secured such payment.”Pub. L. 98–426

Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective , and applicable both with respect to claims filed after , and to claims pending on that date, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–426section 28(a) of Pub. L. 98–426section 901 of this titleSept. 28, 1984Sept. 28, 1984
amendments: Amendments1984—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (a) read as follows: “Every employer shall be liable for and shall secure the payment to his employees of the compensation payable under sections 907, 908, and 909 of this title. Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective , and applicable both with respect to claims filed after , and to claims pending on that date, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–426section 28(a) of Pub. L. 98–426section 901 of this titleSept. 28, 1984Sept. 28, 1984

children.label: a
children.text: Every employer shall be liable for and shall secure the payment to his employees of the compensation payable under sections 907, 908, and 909 of this title. In the case of an employer who is a subcontractor, only if such subcontractor fails to secure the payment of compensation shall the contractor be liable for and be required to secure the payment of compensation. A subcontractor shall not be deemed to have failed to secure the payment of compensation if the contractor has provided insurance for such compensation for the benefit of the subcontractor.

children.label: b
children.text: Compensation shall be payable irrespective of fault as a cause for the injury.
